text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's such a nice day... but I... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day off, I find Rice Shower walking through
the park looking defeated.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Brother... Um, it's no big deal, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Sister... Um, it's no big deal, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I came here because I wanted to sketch the
scenery, but I forgot my sketchbook...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd just buy a new one, but they're sold out everywhere I go. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Depressed, Rice Shower stares listlessly at the
sun's beautiful reflection on the water.
